Class SendEmailService

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.SendEmailService
@Service public class SendEmailService extends Object
Service responsible for composing and sending email messages through user-configured SMTP accounts.

Supports sending new messages, replies and forwarded emails, including file attachments and embedded content preservation. The service also maintains recipient suggestion history used for address auto-completion.

  • Method Details

    • sendEmail

      public Boolean sendEmail(Long userId, String senders, String[] recipients, String subject, String text, String method, org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile[] files, String folderName, Long parentMailId, String actionType)
      Composes and sends an email message using the SMTP configuration associated with the specified sender account.

      The method supports:

      • Sending new messages
      • Replying to existing messages
      • Forwarding existing messages
      • File attachments
      • Automatic recipient suggestion updates
      Parameters:
      userId - identifier of the authenticated user
      senders - sender email address
      recipients - recipient email addresses
      subject - email subject
      text - email body content
      method - sending method identifier
      files - optional file attachments
      folderName - source folder for reply or forward operations
      parentMailId - identifier of the original email message
      actionType - operation type (for example reply or forward)
      Returns:
      true if the email was sent successfully, otherwise false

    • createMailSender

      private org.springframework.mail.javamail.JavaMailSenderImpl createMailSender(EmailAddress account)
      Creates and configures a mail sender instance based on the SMTP settings stored for a user email account.

      The method automatically applies SSL or STARTTLS configuration depending on the account settings.

      Parameters:
      account - email account configuration
      Returns:
      configured mail sender instance
